A '''battle''' on [[Telos IV]] was part of the [[Kwymar Suppressions/Legends|Kwymar Suppressions]], in [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]]. The Rebel forces on [[Telos IV]] were defeated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==The battle==
Early during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], the Rebel bases in the [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]] came under attack by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces in a campaign known as the [[Kwymar Suppressions/Legends|Kwymar Suppressions]]. [[Telos IV]] was one of those [[Planet/Legends|planets]] attacked.<ref name="Valance1" /> The Imperial forces were victorious.<ref name="TEA" />

==Aftermath==
During the Suppressions, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] [[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant Major]] [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]] was severely injured during the [[Assault on Doniphon|campaign]] on nearby [[Doniphon]]. His life was later saved at the [[Anglebay Station]] hospital on Telos.<ref name="Valance2">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin2|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 2|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 2}}</ref>
